question: [File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/middleware/trace.go -> Scope: High: Non-network-based DoS affecting projects with greater than or equal to 25% of the market capitalization on top of the respective layer'] [Function: Write()] Can an unprivileged external user send a response-triggering request that causes tracingResponseWriter.data to accumulate an arbitrarily large []byte slice in heap memory, because Write() assigns w.data = data with no size cap, exhausting process heap and crashing the node?
